journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows a clearly visible 'Start Creating' button linked to /onboarding without scrolling.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js canvas renders at 2064x1028 and a sidebar displays 10 object pickers (Box, Ball, Pillar, Cone, Donut, Tree, House, Star, Cloud, Rock).

journey-ai.evidence: AI companion panel opens with input field; typing 'help me' returns a non-empty response about placing objects in the world.

journey-save.evidence: Save button exists and persists world to gallery, but reloading /builder resets the world name to 'My World' instead of restoring saved state.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery at /gallery renders a 'My Worlds' heading with a saved world card showing name, object count, and date.

spec-product-concept.evidence: final-reply mentions Worldcraft but only as a feature list, not a substantive product concept summary with problem statement, target audience rationale, or value proposition

spec-personas.evidence: No persona definitions found in any file or the final reply

spec-journeys.evidence: No user journey documentation found anywhere in the project

spec-feature-list.evidence: final-reply contains a table of routes/features plus Builder Workspace bullet list with 6+ distinct entries

spec-ia.evidence: No information architecture document or section found

spec-ui-direction.evidence: No UX/UI design direction document; final reply mentions Fredoka font and Tailwind but not a substantive design direction

spec-tech-arch.evidence: final-reply Tech Stack section lists 5 distinct technology choices with roles; src/types/world.ts and stores show architecture in code

spec-db-schema.evidence: src/types/world.ts:1-35 defines WorldObject, WorldProject, AiMessage interfaces serving as the data schema

spec-ai-prompts.evidence: src/app/api/ai/route.ts:39-40 contains full system prompt design plus 15 creative prompts and contextual prompt logic

spec-safety.evidence: No safety or moderation considerations documented; only the system prompt mentions 'children under 12' but no safety policy

spec-impl-plan.evidence: No implementation plan found in any file or the final reply

spec-starter-code.evidence: src/ directory contains 25 files across app/, components/, stores/, types/, lib/ forming a complete starter code structure

spec-priority-screens.evidence: final-reply table lists 5 routes (/, /onboarding, /builder, /gallery, /api/ai) as priority screens with descriptions

visual-anti-patterns.evidence: Gradient orbs/blobs floating on the landing page (yellow circle, pink square, purple circle, green square); feature card body text on landing page appears smaller than 16px

visual-child-friendly.evidence: Large tappable emoji-labeled objects, playful tone in AI buddy, calm pastel palette, minimal text density; sidebar items could be slightly larger

visual-consistency.evidence: Consistent type ramp, card radii, and color palette across pages; minor drift in button accent colors between builder (green Save) and landing/gallery (coral primary)

visual-accessibility.evidence: Good dark-on-light text contrast on most surfaces and text labels on nearly all buttons; no visible focus rings anywhere, no responsive/narrow-width evidence, and some light-colored button text (Open, suggestion chips) with questionable contrast

eng-env-safety.evidence: env config present, no hardcoded keys
